description_long: This is a pair of rectangular, semi-rimless glasses with a sleek, modern design. The frame appears to be made of a lightweight material with a carbon fiber pattern across the brow and temples, giving it a high-tech, urban aesthetic. The lenses are lightly tinted and rectangular, held in place by a thin, minimalist frame that is most prominent along the top edge. The temples are straight and moderately thick, with a subtle curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. Adjustable nose pads are visible, providing comfort and stability for the wearer. No visible brand logo or embellishments are present, emphasizing a clean and functional style.
description: Rectangular, semi-rimless glasses with a carbon fiber-patterned top frame and temples, featuring lightly tinted lenses and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular lenses, carbon fiber-patterned brow, and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, straight temples, and the curvature at the temple tips.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carbon fiber-patterned frame and the alignment of the temples.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin frame, temple shape, and nose pad structure.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, semi-rimless frame with a prominent, straight brow and thin, minimalist lower rims. The temples are straight and moderately thick, curving slightly at the ends for comfort.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are lightly tinted gray, with high transparency and no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a thin, straight bar with adjustable nose pads attached, providing a minimalist and functional connection between the lenses.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples feature a carbon fiber pattern, are straight with a moderate thickness, and curve gently at the tips for a secure fit. No additional engravings or embellishments are visible.
